title: Chole Bhature
description: A classic North Indian dish featuring spicy chickpea curry served with deep-fried, fluffy bread.
steps: Prepare bhature dough by mixing flour, yogurt, and a pinch of salt. Let it rest.
For chole: sauté onions until brown, add tomato puree and chole masala, cook well.
Add boiled chickpeas to the masala and simmer until the gravy thickens.
Roll dough into discs and deep fry in hot oil until puffed. Serve hot with chole.
seoTitle: Chole Bhature Recipe - Best Chinese Festival Recipes

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: Prepare bhature dough by mixing flour, yogurt, and a pinch of salt. Let it rest.

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: For chole: sauté onions until brown, add tomato puree and chole masala, cook well.

instructions.title: Cooking Process
instructions.description: Add boiled chickpeas to the masala and simmer until the gravy thickens.

instructions.title: Finishing Touches
instructions.description: Roll dough into discs and deep fry in hot oil until puffed. Serve hot with chole.

cookingTips: For the best Chole Bhature, always use fresh, high-quality ingredients.
Do not rush the cooking process; allow the flavors to meld naturally.
Adjust the spices according to your personal taste preference.

faq.question: Can I make Chole Bhature ahead of time?
faq.answer: Yes, you can prepare the ingredients in advance, but it's best served fresh.

faq.question: How do I store the leftovers?
faq.answer: Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.

faq.question: Can I freeze this dish?
faq.answer: It is generally not recommended to freeze this as it may alter the texture.
